name: ECOS – Environmental Carbon Optimization System
description: A carbon footprint awareness platform that helps individuals understand, track, and reduce their environmental impact. Features transit emissions tracking (Travel Impact Model), solar offset analysis, real-time air quality monitoring, persistent localStorage-based tracking with net impact indicators, and a Gemini 2.0 Flash AI Eco-Coach with Google Search Grounding that delivers personalized sustainability insights based on the user's tracked data.
